models.title: Warren 30 in. Natural Oak Finish Vanity with Cultured Marble Top
source_fields:
Complete your bathroom with the beautiful Warren 31 in. Natural Oak Finish Vanity with Cultured Marble Top. This freestanding features durable mdf cabinets in stunning natural with a gray cultured marble vanity top and n/a n/a hardware. A charming single integral sink in brilliant gray is included. The Warren 31 in. Natural Oak Finish Vanity with Cultured Marble Top is a versatile choice to customize multiple bathroom settings.

  • Number of Doors: 2
  • Number of Drawers: n/a
  • Number of Shelves: 1
  • Decorative Hardware: not included
  • Mirror: not included
  • Faucet: not included

No assembly is required.

models.title: Eli 25 in. White Vanity with Cultured Marble Top Includes Mirror
source_fields:
Give your bathroom a contemporary update with the Eli 25 in. white bathroom vanity and mirror set. The pre-assembled bathroom vanity features furniture-grade construction, a white laminate finish, beautiful matte black hardware, and a 1-piece white cultured marble sink top. And its 2-door under-sink cabinet and full-extension bottom drawer provide easy-access bathroom storage. A matching 20.3 in. W x 24.1 in. H white mirror completes this set for a stunning upgrade to any bathroom.

  • A full-extension drawer and 2-door cabinet provide complete access to your bathroom essentials
  • 1-piece cultured marble top includes an integral rectangular sink and is pre-drilled for a 4 in. centerset faucet
  • Matte black hardware included for added convenience and style
  • 6-way adjustable hinges and adjustable drawer face provide easy alignment after installation
  • 20.3 in. W x 24.1 in. H white mirror included
  • Faucet not included

Open-back vanity cabinet is fully assembled for easy installation.

models.title: Capri 31 in. Deep Blue Vanity Includes Mirror
source_fields:
Update your bathroom with the Capri 31 in. Deep Blue bathroom vanity and mirror set. This pre-assembled bathroom vanity features furniture-grade construction, a Deep Blue laminate finish, satin nickel hardware, and a granite-style Stone Effects cultured marble sink top. And its 3 full-extension drawers and soft-close 1-door under-sink cabinet provide easy-access bathroom storage. A matching 21.1 in. W x 27.1 in. H Deep Blue mirror completes this set for a stunning upgrade to any bathroom.

  • 3 full-extension drawers and soft-close 1-door cabinet provide easy-access bathroom storage
  • Stone Effects vanity top features a granite-style Everest finish and includes an attached white undermount sink and an unattached 3.5 in. matching backsplash
  • Satin nickel hardware included for added convenience and style
  • 6-way adjustable hinges and adjustable drawer faces provide easy alignment after installation
  • 21.1 in. W x 27.1 in. H Deep Blue mirror included
  • Pre-drilled for an 8 in. widespread faucet; Faucet not included

Open-back vanity cabinet is fully assembled for easy installation.

models.title: Janna Bathroom Vanity Cabinet 24 inch Single Sink
source_fields: The Janna bathroom vanity transforms your daily routine into a serene, spa-like retreat, showcasing beautiful natural rift-cut white oak veneers that introduce organic warmth and soothing linear textures to any space. Defined by its minimalist Scandinavian influence and striking free-standing silhouette, this exquisite centerpiece effortlessly anchors the contemporary bath. Constructed of environmentally friendly, high-grade solid hardwood and other premium cabinet-grade materials, the Janna is engineered to resist warping and built to last a lifetime. Beyond its stunning exterior, the cabinet provides ample organizational capacity across the entire line, with select larger models featuring the added strength and classic aesthetic of deep, dovetail-joined drawers. Elevated by sophisticated angular hardware and whisper-quiet soft-close hinges, the Janna delivers a flawless fusion of nature-inspired beauty and modern architectural functionality.

models.title: Sutherland 48 in. Mist Gray Vanity Includes Mirror
source_fields:
Upgrade your bathroom with the beautiful Sutherland 48 in. Mist Gray bathroom vanity and mirror set. This pre-assembled gray bathroom vanity features furniture-grade construction, painted solid wood door and drawer faces, beautiful satin nickel hardware, and a 1-piece white cultured marble sink top with a 3.5 in backsplash. And its 6 full-extension drawers and soft-close 2-door under-sink cabinet provide easy-access bathroom storage. A matching 26.2 in. W x 32 in. H Mist Gray mirror completes this set for a stunning addition to any bathroom.

  • 6 full-extension drawers and soft-close 2-door cabinet provide easy-access bathroom storage
  • Cultured marble vanity top includes an integral rectangular sink and a 3.5 in. backsplash
  • Satin nickel hardware included for added convenience and style
  • 6-way adjustable hinges and adjustable drawer faces provide easy alignment after installation
  • 26.2 in. W x 32 in. H Mist Gray mirror included
  • Pre-drilled for a 4 in. centerset faucet; Faucet not included

Open-back vanity cabinet is fully assembled for easy installation.

models.title: Beckett Bathroom Vanity with Countertop 30 inch Single Sink Single hole Faucet Setup
source_fields: The Beckett vanity embodies a timeless transitional aesthetic, offering an elegant balance of classic charm and modern utility. Defined by its clean architectural lines and refined proportions, this collection serves as a versatile centerpiece that complements a wide range of bathroom styles. Constructed of environmentally friendly, high-grade solid hardwood and other premium cabinet-grade materials, the Beckett is engineered to resist warping and built to last a lifetime. Combining sophisticated artistry with practical luxury, the cabinet provides ample organization across the entire line, with select larger models featuring the added strength and classic aesthetic of deep, dovetail-joined drawers. Complete with concealed soft-close hinges for a whisper-quiet experience and premium metal hardware accents, the Beckett delivers a seamless blend of high-end style and everyday functionality.

models.title: Kohler® 33525-ASB-0 Helst™ Bathroom Vanity Set, 35-13/16 in OAH x 60-1/8 in OAW x 18-1/16 in OAD, Floor Mount
source_fields: Helst™ plays it subtle by combining clean lines, tasteful shiplap style drawer door panels and minimalist hardware. The modern vanity collection features a tall leg option with below deck shelf or install without legs for a wall hung alternative. Personalize your bathroom furniture with choice of cabinet color. Cabinet, countertop, sinks, tall legs with shelf and brushed nickel hardware are included and ready for DIY installation. Additional hardware finishes are available (sold separately).

Helst™ plays it subtle by combining clean lines, tasteful shiplap style drawer and door fronts and minimalist hardware. The modern vanity collection features a tall leg option with below deck shelf or install without legs for a wall hung alternative. Personalize your bathroom furniture with choice of cabinet color. Cabinet, countertop, sink, tall legs with shelf and brushed nickel hardware are included and ready for DIY installation. Additional hardware finishes are available (sold separately).

Timeless, simplistic pieces updated for the modern home, Winnow™ bathroom cabinets are at once familiar and different. Optional tall, tapered legs and symmetrical design are recognizably shaker, while beveled door and drawer fronts and hardware with rounded corners deliver fresh details. The perfect balance of classic, elegant and versatile, Winnow™ vanities come to life when you select your cabinet color. Cabinet, countertop, sinks, legs, shelf and brushed nickel hardware are included with the set, which is ready for self assembly on legs. Additional hardware finishes are available (sold separately).

Additional hardware finishes are available (sold separately).

notes: Model intelligence is a compound workflow: category search, model extraction, spec-document capture, and model-page probing.
Blocked model pages are reported as evidence instead of silently dropping retailer coverage.
Category search-result model discovery used; search-derived prices are labeled as fallback evidence, not direct retailer API results.
